description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, geometric design with a mix of large glass windows and white exterior paneling. The structure includes two visible stories, with the upper level partially enclosed by glass walls and a balcony area. The ground floor boasts expansive floor-to-ceiling windows, providing ample natural light and a strong connection to the outdoors. A spacious rooftop terrace is present, partially covered with greenery and outdoor furniture, while a wooden-fenced patio area adds a touch of warmth and privacy. The building is accented by a series of arched trellises with climbing plants, enhancing its contemporary yet inviting appearance. The overall layout is open and airy, with multiple outdoor living spaces integrated into the design.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with flat roofs, large glass windows, rooftop terrace, and wooden patio, featuring clean lines and integrated greenery.
description_view_0: This view highlights the rooftop terrace with grid tiling, arched trellises with greenery, and large ground-floor windows.
description_view_1: The front facade is visible here, showing the main entrance, a tall glass wall, and a glimpse into the upper and lower interiors.
description_view_2: This angle reveals the wooden-fenced patio filled with red decor, a large window, and the upper balcony with glass walls.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the expansive tiled rooftop, a hammock, and more large windows, with the wooden patio visible to the left.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass walls
